'''鈭歮-l-r-r''' ('''kamalreroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jemmy|jemmy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jemmy|jemmy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-l-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| kamalreroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimalreroko|thimalreroko]] || [[word:jimalreroko|jimalreroko]] || [[word:shimalreroko|shimalreroko]] || [[word:kimalreroko|kimalreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumalreroko|thuthumalreroko]] || [[word:jujumalreroko|jujumalreroko]] || [[word:shushumalreroko|shushumalreroko]] || [[word:kukumalreroko|kukumalreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumalreroko|thumalreroko]] || [[word:jumalreroko|jumalreroko]] || [[word:shumalreroko|shumalreroko]] || [[word:kumalreroko|kumalreroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumalreroko|thumalreroko]] || [[word:jumalreroko|jumalreroko]] || [[word:shumalreroko|shumalreroko]] || [[word:kumalreroko|kumalreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themalreroko|themalreroko]] || [[word:jemalreroko|jemalreroko]] || [[word:shemalreroko|shemalreroko]] || [[word:kemalreroko|kemalreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomalreroko|thothomalreroko]] || [[word:jojomalreroko|jojomalreroko]] || [[word:shoshomalreroko|shoshomalreroko]] || [[word:kokomalreroko|kokomalreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomalreroko|thomalreroko]] || [[word:jomalreroko|jomalreroko]] || [[word:shomalreroko|shomalreroko]] || [[word:komalreroko|komalreroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomalreroko|thomalreroko]] || [[word:jomalreroko|jomalreroko]] || [[word:shomalreroko|shomalreroko]] || [[word:komalreroko|komalreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙malreroko|th忙malreroko]] || [[word:j忙malreroko|j忙malreroko]] || [[word:sh忙malreroko|sh忙malreroko]] || [[word:k忙malreroko|k忙malreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamalreroko|thathamalreroko]] || [[word:jajamalreroko|jajamalreroko]] || [[word:shashamalreroko|shashamalreroko]] || [[word:kakamalreroko|kakamalreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamalreroko|thamalreroko]] || [[word:jamalreroko|jamalreroko]] || [[word:shamalreroko|shamalreroko]] || [[word:kamalreroko|kamalreroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamalreroko|thamalreroko]] || [[word:jamalreroko|jamalreroko]] || [[word:shamalreroko|shamalreroko]] || [[word:kamalreroko|kamalreroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
